---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::: {.home-shell}

:::: {.home-layout}

:::: {.home-rail}

## On this page

- [Overview](#overview)
- [Figures](#figures)
- [Notation](#notation)
- [Quick start](#quick-start)

::::

:::: {.home-main}

:::: {.hero-grid #overview}

:::: {.hero-copy}

<span class="section-label">Path signatures for spectral lines</span>

# spectropath {.hero-name}

Low-order path coordinates for spectral-line profiles.

The package follows the notation used in the paper and keeps the interface
small: build a path, compute the coefficients, and compare them with
classical summaries.

::: {.inline-links}
[Quick start](#quick-start)
[Python](python.html)
[Reference](reference.html)
[GitHub](https://github.com/RafaelSdeSouza/spectropath)
:::

::::

:::: {.code-card}

Minimal workflow

```r
library(spectropath)

u <- seq(-5, 5, length.out = 500)
f <- dnorm(u, 0, 1) + 0.25 * dnorm(u, 1.8, 0.45)
path <- cbind(u, f)

path_features(path)
```

```text
      p2   p_pm    p3u    p3F    p4F    p4T
 -0.3133 0.000 -0.0169 -0.1736 0.4534 0.0132
```

::::

::::

## Figures {#figures .section-heading}

:::: {.showcase-grid}

:::: {.showcase-lead}

:::: {.showcase-frame .showcase-frame-wide}
![](site-assets/moffat_stress_cases_panel_boundary_regions_row1.png)
::::

::: {.showcase-caption}
Controlled profile pairs.
:::
::::

:::: {.showcase-side}

:::: {.kinematics-pair}
![](site-assets/kinematics_context_crop.png){.kinematics-slice}
![](site-assets/kinematics_starlet_crop.png){.kinematics-slice}
::::

::: {.showcase-caption}
IFU kinematic pair.
:::
::::

::::

## Notation {#notation .section-heading}

::: {.notation-strip}
`p2` `p3u` `p3F` `p4F` `p4T` `p_pm`
:::

## Quick start {#quick-start .section-heading}

:::: {.quick-grid}

:::: {.quick-card}

Install

```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("RafaelSdeSouza/spectropath")
library(spectropath)
```

::::

:::: {.quick-card}

Compute

```r
u <- seq(-5, 5, length.out = 500)
f <- dnorm(u, 0, 1) + 0.25 * dnorm(u, 1.8, 0.45)
path <- cbind(u, f)

path_features(path)
classical_features(path)
```

::::

::::

::::

::::

::::
